comment: Hand-authored degradation-profile -> node-chain routing for Simple Mode. Stages are evaluated in order; each stage whose conditions all match appends its node to the chain. Metrics come from DegradationProfile.metrics(). Every node here must be permissively licensed (enforced by RuleTable.validate). Thresholds: blur_score is Laplacian variance on a 0-255 scale (< ~100 = soft, < ~40 = clearly blurry); noise_score is a robust sigma on 0-1 luma (> ~0.008 = visibly noisy); jpeg_blockiness is boundary/interior gradient excess (> ~0.12 = visible 8x8 blocking).

stages.reason: visible JPEG block artifacts — remove compression artifacts first so later models don't amplify them
visible noise at native resolution — RealESRGAN's degradation model doubles as a denoiser
faces detected — fast face restoration baseline (the default fast face node)
soft/blurred faces — follow up with the default quality face node
